ocr_findings.description: The '選択' diagram shows two separate tables (source table and result table after selection) side-by-side with an arrow between them. OCR merges them into a single markdown table with duplicate header row rather than two distinct tables. The visual distinction between 'before' and 'after selection' is lost.
The '射影' result (extracted 学生名 column as vertical list) is rendered as a one-column table with '射影' as a cell rather than as a header/label. Structurally awkward but content preserved.

reviewer_notes: Page covers データ操作 table and 選択/射影 operations with diagram illustrations. The データ操作 summary table (6 rows: 選択/挿入/更新/削除/射影/結合) is correctly captured. The main quality issue is the 選択 before/after diagram being merged into one table, losing the operation semantics. No missing prose text.
